name: Amaretti Cookies #4
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, pulse the almonds until they are finely ground and remain loose.
2. Mix the ground almonds with powdered sugar and all-purpose flour in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites to soft peaks. Gradually add granulated sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
4. Gently fold in lemon zest and almond extract into the beaten egg whites.
5. Pipe or drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto baking sheets lined with lightly buttered wax paper or parchment.
6. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for 1 hour, checking periodically to ensure the cookies do not brown.
7. Turn off the oven and allow the amaretti to cool completely on wire racks for an additional hour.
8. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator or freezer.
